career.name: Columbia Housing
career.title: Systems & Operations Assistant
description: Leading development of Dorm Room Viewer, a web platform for 9,000+ Columbia students to preview residence halls, serving images from AWS S3 through a protected REST API.
Built Node.js automation services that aggregate and synchronize Housing data across systems, eliminating manual data entry and reducing administrative errors.

career.name: Headstarter AI
career.title: Software Engineering Fellow
description: Shipped 5 production-ready AI applications in weekly sprints using Next.js, TypeScript, OpenAI, Pinecone, and Stripe.
Won 1st place among 75+ participants at a TikTok-sponsored hackathon with a real-time blogging platform featuring infinite scroll and live updates.

career.name: Freelance
career.title: Software Engineer
description: Designed and delivered 500+ custom websites and applications for clients using React.js, Node.js, and MongoDB.
Built and scaled Discord bots — growing one to 13,000,000 users across 13,000+ servers — with Redis caching and queue-based architecture for low-latency performance.
